message:
Apply idiomatic Rust lint fixes, refactor TUI deferred actions to channels

Code quality improvements applied consistently across the codebase:
- Replace unsafe 'as' casts with u16::try_from().unwrap_or(u16::MAX) to
  prevent silent truncation on overflow (tui_widgets.rs, tui_app.rs)
- Use Duration::from_mins() instead of from_secs(60) for readability
- Replace map_or(true, ...) with is_none_or() (storage/lib.rs)
- Use closure-style PoisonError::into_inner instead of inline closure
- Convert match blocks to map_or_else where idiomatic (queries.rs)
- Flatten nested if-let blocks to Rust let-chains (queries.rs,
  messaging.rs, build_slots.rs)
- Use let-else pattern instead of match Ok/Err (build_slots.rs)
- Change collect_slot_conflicts parameter from &Option<String> to
  Option<&str> for idiomatic borrowing
- Fix exclusive field cast from i32 to i64 to match column type
- Correct FNV-1a hash prime from 0x1000_0000_1b3 to 0x0100_0000_01b3
- Use XOR assignment operator (h ^= ...) instead of h = h ^ ...
- Add platform-conditional compilation for FileLock timestamp handling

Dead code removal:
- Remove reload_inserted_message_id function (~30 lines) from queries.rs
  that was a FrankenConnection last_insert_rowid() workaround no longer
  needed

TUI architecture improvement (tui_app.rs):
- Replace global DEFERRED_CONFIRMED_ACTION static Mutex with action_tx/
  action_rx channel on MailAppModel, eliminating global mutable state
  and lock/poisoning concerns
- Make adjust_diff_action_for_overlays a static method since it uses no
  instance state
- Refactor drain_deferred_confirmed_action to use Vec collection with
  Cmd::batch instead of iterative merging
- Update all related tests to use channel-based API

CLI fix (cli/src/lib.rs):
- Rename 'count' to 'released_rows' in handle_macros_async to reflect
  that release_reservations returns a Vec, derive released_count via
  Vec::len for JSON response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

             .iter()
             .map(|r| {
@@ -603,7 +602,7 @@ pub async fn release_file_reservations(
 
     tracing::debug!(
         "Released {} reservations for {} in project {} (paths: {:?}, ids: {:?})",
-        released,
+        released_rows.len(),
         agent_name,
         project_key,
         paths,
